scripts.infra:reset: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml down -v && npm run infra:up
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run build -w packages/permissions
scripts.build:ci: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.lint:ci: npm run lint:ci -w apps/api && npm run lint --if-present -w packages/contracts && npm run lint --if-present -w packages/permissions
scripts.test:e2e:ci: echo "API E2E legacy suite deferred; CI baseline uses focused assistant smoke tests and dedicated web E2E workflow."
